name: Coconut (food medium)
description: Food-derived medium: metabolizable components of Coconut (Cocos nucifera) [Fruits] from FooDB, plus a standard M9 mineral base. Organic components use presence-based uptake bounds; FooDB content retained. Measured compounds with no BiGG exchange are listed under uncovered.

provenance.citation: FooDB v2020-04-07 (Wishart DS et al., foodb.ca). Content sources: DTU, DUKE, USDA.
provenance.notes: Organic components mapped from FooDB compounds to BiGG via InChIKey/name. Mineral base added. Bounds presence-based; foodb_content retained. Unmapped measured compounds kept in uncovered (v2 completeness fix). IMPORTANT: composition values are taken from the archived FooDB 2020-04-07 CSV data release; FooDB's live food page no longer displays this bulk composition, so it will appear empty. Verify individual compounds via the per-component cross-reference links. Underlying content was aggregated by FooDB from USDA / DTU / Phenol Explorer.
provenance.verification: expert-curated (multi-source food composition; growth-relevant profile completed, FooDB noise removed)
curation_sources: USDA FoodData Central FDC 170169 (SR Legacy: Nuts, coconut meat, raw) - proximates, sugars, fatty acids, amino acids, minerals, vitamins
nutritionvalue.org / fitaudit (USDA 170169 mirrors) - per-nutrient fatty acid & amino acid amounts, choline
Wikipedia Coconut USDA nutrition table (FDC 170169) - vitamins & minerals
Adoyo, Sila & Onyango 2021, Afr. J. Food Sci. 15(8):313-321, DOI:10.5897/AJFS2021.2116 - Kenyan varietal proximates, lauric dominance
PMC12691760 (Foods 2025) - fatty acid & phenolic profiles of mature vs tender coconut
IntechOpen coconut chapter chapters/1179190 - mature-kernel galactomannan/mannan reserve carbohydrate
PMC7174220 / coconut sap & maturation sugar literature - sucrose-dominant free sugar with maturity
FooDB FOOD00336 - broad compound listing (source of curated components and removed noise)
provenance.curation_notes: Dominant carbon/energy sources for a microbe on raw coconut meat are (1) medium-chain-fatty-acid triacylglycerols, above all lauric acid (14.9 g/100g), and (2) the mannan/galactomannan cell-wall storage polysaccharide plus fiber (~24 g combined); free fermentable sugars are low (~6.2 g total, predominantly sucrose) and organic acids are minor (they concentrate in coconut water, not the solid kernel). Removed 4 toxic heavy metals, ~20 non-nutritive trace/lanthanide elements, and several implausib
curation_added: quantified all fatty acids C6:0-C18:2 (lauric 14.86 g dominant)
quantified full amino-acid panel (arginine 0.55 g, glutamate 0.76 g highest)
quantified full vitamin panel (B1/B2/B3/B5/B6/B9/C/E/K) + choline 12.1 mg
quantified full mineral panel (K 356, P 113, Mg 32, Ca 14, Fe 2.43, Mn 1.5, Zn 1.1, Cu 0.44 mg, Se 10.1 ug)
dietary fiber 9.0 g and mannan/galactomannan storage polysaccharide flagged as the major non-lipid carbon reserve
organic acids (malic/citric/shikimic) noted as minor in mature meat (concentrate in coconut water)

curation_removed.name: Bromine

curation_removed.name: Fluorine
curation_removed.reason: trace halogen, not a growth nutrient

curation_removed.name: Calcium oxide
curation_removed.reason: not a real food chemical species; ashing artifact for reporting Ca, already covered by calcium

curation_removed.name: epsilon-Polylysine
curation_removed.reason: microbial-fermentation food preservative additive, not a native coconut nutrient; FooDB cross-listing

curation_removed.name: (R)-Oxypeucedanin
curation_removed.reason: furanocoumarin (Apiaceae/citrus phytochemical), biologically implausible in coconut; FooDB predicted

curation_removed.name: Isoflavones
curation_removed.reason: legume (soy) phytochemical class, implausible in coconut; FooDB predicted/cross-listing

curation_removed.name: Genistein
curation_removed.reason: soy isoflavone, implausible in coconut; FooDB predicted/cross-listing

curation_removed.name: (+/-)-erythro-Isoleucine
curation_removed.reason: non-physiological racemate artifact; real L-isoleucine already listed

curation_removed.name: Methoxyl
curation_removed.reason: chemical fragment/substituent, not a discrete nutrient compound

curation_removed.name: Cobalt (Co2+)
curation_removed.reason: ultra-trace, not an established coconut-meat nutrient (no B12 in a plant food); FooDB noise

curation_removed.name: Nickel
curation_removed.reason: ultra-trace, not an established growth nutrient here; FooDB noise

curation_removed.name: Chromium
curation_removed.reason: ultra-trace, unquantified, likely FooDB noise/contaminant

curation_removed.name: Molybdate
curation_removed.reason: ultra-trace, unquantified; retain only if model requires Mo cofactor

curation_removed.name: Iodine
curation_removed.reason: ultra-trace, not an established coconut-meat nutrient; FooDB noise
